llm-openai.description: GPT models via the OpenAI API — supports GPT-4, GPT-3.5, and custom models

llm-letta.description: Stateful agents with persistent memory via the Letta (MemGPT) API

llm-flowise.description: Visual LLM orchestration via the Flowise API — drag-and-drop AI workflows

llm-openwebui.description: Connect to a self-hosted OpenWebUI instance — supports multiple LLM backends

llm-openswarm.description: Multi-agent orchestration via the OpenSwarm API — coordinate multiple AI agents

memory-mem0.description: Persistent memory for AI agents via Mem0 — stores facts, preferences, and context across sessions

message-discord.description: Connect your bots to Discord servers — supports slash commands, threads, and voice

message-slack.description: Connect your bots to Slack workspaces — supports app home, modals, and workflows

message-mattermost.description: Connect your bots to self-hosted Mattermost instances — secure enterprise messaging
